name: Animation
description: Allows to use animated images on displays. Animation inherits all options from the image component. It adds additional lambda methods: `next_frame()`, `prev_frame()` and `set_frame()` to change the shown picture of a gif.

config_entries.label: Type
config_entries.description: Specifies how to encode image internally. See the [image component](https://esphome.io/components/image#display-image) for more information.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The ID with which you will be able to reference the animation later in your display code.

config_entries.label: File
config_entries.description: The path (relative to where the .yaml file is) of the gif file.

config_entries.label: Loop
config_entries.description: If you want to loop over a subset of your animation (e.g. a fire animation where the fire "starts", then "burns" and "dies") you can specify some frames to loop over.

config_entries.label: End Frame
config_entries.description: The last frame to show in the loop; when this frame is reached it will loop back to `start_frame`. Defaults to the last frame in the animation.

config_entries.label: Repeat
config_entries.description: Specifies how many times the loop will run. When the count is reached, the animation will continue with the next frame after `end_frame`, or restart from the beginning if `end_frame` was the last frame. Defaults to "loop forever".

config_entries.label: Start Frame
config_entries.description: The frame to loop back to when `end_frame` is reached. Defaults to the first frame in the animation.

config_entries.label: Resize
config_entries.description: If set, this will resize all the frames to fit inside the given dimensions `WIDTHxHEIGHT` and preserve the aspect ratio.

config_entries.label: Transparency
config_entries.description: If set the alpha channel of the input image will be taken into account. The possible values are `opaque` (default), `chroma_key` and `alpha_channel`. See discussion on transparency in the [image component](https://esphome.io/components/image#display-image).
